name: Constellation Energy Corporation
description: Constellation Energy Corporation is the largest producer of carbon-free energy in the United States and a leading supplier of energy products and services. Headquartered in Baltimore, Maryland, the company operates a diverse fleet of nuclear, hydro, wind, and solar generation facilities, providing sustainable power to millions of homes and businesses. As a major player in the transition to a clean energy economy, Constellation focuses on delivering reliable, low-carbon electricity while advancing innovative energy solutions and supporting the decarbonization goals of its customers and communities across the nation.
